expectations.text: References the baseline data: HOT 24% meetings, 36% replies
expectations.evidence: Response provides general conversion rate guidance ('HOT leads معدل الرد عادة 15-40%' and 'معدل تحويل من رد إلى اجتماع = 40-60%') but does not reference the specific 24% and 36% baseline numbers from the data.

expectations.text: Compares HOT vs WARM conversion metrics
expectations.evidence: Response provides comparison: 'WARM leads معدل الرد عادة 5-15%' vs 'HOT leads معدل الرد عادة 15-40%' and meeting conversion 10-25% vs 40-60%

expectations.text: Suggests querying Notion or provides analysis methodology
expectations.evidence: Response provides general recommendations ('احفظ بيانات الرد والاجتماعات لكل tier لمدة شهر أو شهرين') but does not provide specific Notion query methodology or detailed analysis approach.
